tagline: Post-purchase upsell, checkout optimization, and thank-you page monetization

pricingIntel.summary: Not publicly listed. 14-day free trial, pricing likely scales with order volume
details: No visible pricing tiers on the website
Acquired by Rokt. enterprise pricing model likely
Multiple products (cart optimization, checkout, post-purchase upsell, Rokt Thanks) may be priced separately
costDrivers: Order volume. more orders = more upsell opportunities = likely higher tier
Product mix. each of the 4 products (cart, checkout, post-purchase, Rokt Thanks) may carry separate fees
Rokt Thanks intensity. low/average/high ad placements on thank-you page

benefits.label: Upsell Revenue
benefits.description: Post-purchase one-click upsells. After checkout, customers see an add-on offer before the thank-you page — no re-entering payment info, just frictionless additional purchases.

upsellTakeRate.label: % of orders that accept the post-purchase upsell
upsellTakeRate.source: industry benchmark (post-purchase upsell acceptance rates: 3-8% depending on offer relevance)

upsellPctOfAov.label: Upsell value as % of original AOV
upsellPctOfAov.source: dtcmvp estimate (typical post-purchase add-on is 25-50% of original cart)

benefits.label: CVR Lift
benefits.description: Checkout and cart enhancements (trust badges, urgency timers, recommended bundles) reduce abandonment and recover conversions that would have been lost.

conversionLiftPct.label: Incremental conversion lift from checkout optimization
conversionLiftPct.source: dtcmvp estimate (checkout optimization tools typically lift conversion 3-8%)

benefits.label: Ad Revenue
benefits.description: Rokt Thanks ads. Non-competing brand ads on your thank-you page generate pure profit per order, monetizing a page that otherwise just says 'thanks.'

revenuePerOrder.label: Revenue per order from thank-you page ads
revenuePerOrder.source: dtcmvp estimate based on Aftersell claim of 'up to $0.50 in pure profit per order'. discounted to $0.35

sources: Aftersell claims: 'Brands using Aftersell generate up to $0.50 in pure profit per order'
Aftersell claims: 'Directional projections based on Rokt's extensive global benchmarks across billions of transactions'
Calculator inputs: monthly order volume, product mix (cart/checkout/post-purchase/Rokt Thanks), gross margin

narrative.headline: Aftersell could add {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} through post-purchase upsells and checkout optimization.

byDepartment.Ecommerce / DTC: For {contactName} on the ecom side: Aftersell adds revenue at three points in the checkout funnel: cart optimization, post-purchase upsells, and thank-you page ads. The {revenueTotal}/yr total comes from customers who have already committed to buying, so it is incremental to your existing conversion rate.
byDepartment.Marketing / Growth: For {contactName} and the marketing team: this is pure bottom-of-funnel revenue that requires zero additional traffic. {revenueTotal}/yr comes from monetizing the checkout and post-purchase experience for {brandName}'s existing orders.
byDepartment.Finance / Accounting: For {contactName} reviewing the budget: Aftersell's value to {brandName} is {totalValue}/yr across three revenue streams. At {targetMultiple} target, the ceiling is {maxMonthly}/mo. The thank-you page ads ({benefit_thank_you_page_revenue}/yr) are essentially pure margin.
byDepartment.Founder & CEO: For {contactName}: Aftersell adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} by monetizing your checkout flow. Post-purchase upsells, checkout enhancements, and thank-you page ads. At your {targetMultiple} target, the ceiling is {maxMonthly}/mo.
byDepartment.Other: Aftersell adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} by creating upsell moments after checkout and monetizing the thank-you page with non-competing brand ads.

byCategory.Apparel & Fashion: Apparel brands see strong post-purchase upsell performance because add-on items (accessories, matching pieces, care products) are natural complements. {brandName}'s upsell take rate may land higher than our 4% SWAG.
byCategory.Beauty & Cosmetics: Beauty brands are a natural fit for post-purchase upsells because shoppers respond well to 'complete the routine' suggestions. Trial-size add-ons convert particularly well in the post-checkout flow.
byCategory.Health & Wellness: Health and wellness brands benefit from subscription upsells in the post-purchase flow. Suggesting a recurring add-on (supplements, refills) right after checkout captures intent at its peak.
byCategory.Other: Post-purchase upsell performance varies by category and product catalog depth. Brands with complementary product lines see the strongest results.

notes: Aftersell has a live ROI calculator at aftersell.com/rokt-revenue-forecast. strong Tier 1 upgrade candidate. Their calculator asks for monthly orders, product mix, and gross margin. The $0.50/order claim is their ceiling; we SWAG $0.35 for the Rokt Thanks benefit. The post-purchase upsell and checkout optimization benefits are SWAGged from industry benchmarks since their calculator bundles all products into one output.
